ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "start_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting entity in the interaction */,
  "end_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending entity in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of interaction (e.g., TEST, CONTROL) */,
  "interaction_subtype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subtype of interaction (e.g., ACTIVATION, INHIBITION) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight or strength of the interaction */,
  "interaction_source" TEXT /* Source of the interaction data (e.g., experiment, literature) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction was observed or recorded */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level or reliability of the interaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_end_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_start_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_interaction_subtype_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_subtype_id") REFERENCES interaction_subtypes ("interaction_subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., protein, gene, signaling molecule) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity */,
  "entity_source" TEXT /* Source of the entity data (e.g., database, experiment) */,
  "entity_date" TEXT /* Date when the entity was first identified or recorded */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the entity in external databases */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "interaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent interaction type */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interaction type is deprecated or archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_subtypes" (
  "interaction_subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction subtype */,
  "interaction_subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction subtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction subtype */,
  "parent_subtype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent interaction subtype */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interaction subtype is deprecated or archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_subtypes_parent_subtype_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_subtype_id") REFERENCES interaction_subtypes ("interaction_subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction being logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the interaction being logged */,
  "previous_weight" INTEGER /* Previous weight of the interaction before the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_logs_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction network */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the network */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the network was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the network */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the network was last modified */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the network is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_networks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_networks_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
